name: sim_pyg_deep_hopf_u1_equivariant_conservation
description: S^3 Hopf-discretized carrier; PyG MessagePassing symmetric Laplacian smoother on complex scalar charge; verifies (1) linear charge conservation sum_i f_i under repeated propagate(); (2) U(1) global equivariance of the update; (3) that message() is invoked with the expected (E,2) shape. Negative controls: asymmetric rule breaks conservation, channel-swap rule breaks U(1) equivariance.

pytorch.reason: torch tensors, complex arithmetic, and autograd-capable Module carry the node feature state and all arithmetic operations.

pyg.reason: torch_geometric.nn.MessagePassing subclass with explicit message() and propagate(edge_index, x=x); edge_index tensor drives aggregation; removing PyG eliminates the sim's claim.

z3.reason: not needed: claim is numerical invariance under symmetric MP

cvc5.reason: not needed: numerical proof path only

sympy.reason: not needed: closed-form conservation is by construction

clifford.reason: not needed: scalar complex charge, no multivector

geomstats.reason: not needed: Hopf sampling done explicitly

e3nn.reason: not needed: U(1) equivariance checked directly

gudhi.reason: not needed: no persistent homology claim

invariant_preserved: sum_i f_i (complex linear charge) under SymmetricComplexSmoother
